subcodes.first_line: O thou dear daughter! Thy letter hath been received. It is understood that thou hast bestowed the utmost effort in the translation of some talks
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه شما رسید و معلوم گردید که در ترجمه بعضی بیانات نهایت همت را
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
